name: United Kingdom
description: The United Kingdom offers world-renowned education with prestigious universities like Oxford and Cambridge. Known for its rich academic heritage, cutting-edge research, and vibrant student life, the UK attracts over 600,000 international students annually.
shortDescription: Home to world-class universities and rich academic heritage

name: United States
description: The United States hosts the largest number of international students worldwide, offering unparalleled diversity in programs and research opportunities. From Ivy League institutions to innovative tech hubs, American universities lead in various fields.
shortDescription: Diverse programs and world-leading research institutions

name: Canada
description: Canada is known for its welcoming immigration policies, high quality of life, and affordable education compared to other English-speaking countries. Post-graduation work permits make it an attractive destination for international students.
shortDescription: Affordable education with excellent post-study work options

name: Australia
description: Australia combines world-class education with an enviable lifestyle. With seven universities in the global top 100, strong industry connections, and post-study work rights, Australia is a top choice for ambitious students.

name: Germany
description: Germany offers tuition-free education at public universities, making it one of the most affordable destinations for international students. Known for engineering excellence and strong industry partnerships.

name: Ireland
description: Ireland offers English-language education in a welcoming, culturally rich environment. Home to many global tech companies, it provides excellent career opportunities for graduates in technology and business sectors.
shortDescription: English education with strong tech industry connections
